management.title: Product Manager
management.headline: Owns user outcomes, product priorities, scope, readiness, and release decisions.

operations.title: Engineering Manager
operations.headline: Owns executable delivery, technical coordination, Contractor dispatch, integration, and verification.

consultants.title: Product Designer
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts coherent user journeys, interaction behavior, and interface quality.
readinessRequirements: Target users, journey, states, content, accessibility needs, and interaction acceptance are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Representative flows at target viewports demonstrate usable, coherent, and accessible behavior.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects product-design work inside the approved design boundary.

contractorBench.headline: Implements bounded frontend, backend, mobile, API, or integration work.
Implements bounded infrastructure, reliability, data, migration, or operational work.
Runs bounded tests, diagnostics, research, review, and reproducible verification.

internalAudit.title: Internal Audit
internalAudit.headline: Independently evaluates the harness without joining the project team.
